attribution_note: Flags and player photos sourced from Wikimedia Commons under CC-BY / CC-BY-SA. Per-asset attribution is preserved in players.json `attribution` and teams.json `flag_svg_url`. We bundle no copyrighted FIFA imagery; flags use Wikimedia Commons assets only.

refresh_policy.fallback: On upstream failure the previous cached snapshot is preserved and a warning is emitted; never crash the build.

sources.license: © FIFA — fixture data; no FIFA imagery bundled
sources.name: FIFA.com — official 2026 World Cup match schedule

sources.license: CC-BY / CC-BY-SA / public domain — see per-asset attribution
sources.name: Wikimedia Commons (flags + player photos)
